parameters.name: totallength
parameters.label: Total Length
parameters.description: Determines the number of points.

parameters.name: outputcurve
parameters.label: Output Curve
parameters.description: Selects the type of primitive to output.

parameters.name: normalizeu
parameters.label: Normalize U
parameters.description: Normalize all the U values so their range is 0 to 1.

parameters.name: symmetric
parameters.label: Symmetric
parameters.description: Enable mirroring the curve segments.

parameters.name: parsize
parameters.label: Parameter Size
parameters.description: Number of independent configurable parameter values.

parameters.name: startu
parameters.label: Start U
parameters.description: Start U position for the first segment.

parameters.name: seg
parameters.label: Segment
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for creating curve segments.

parameters.name: seg0type
parameters.label: Curve Type
parameters.description: The interponation type of the curve between the start and end of the segment.

parameters.name: seg0u
parameters.label: U
parameters.description: Sets the segments end U.

parameters.name: seg0specstartval
parameters.label: Specify Start Value
parameters.description: When set, the segment has a start value, otherwise it is a continuation of the previous segment.

parameters.name: seg0alpha
parameters.label: Alpha
parameters.description: One paramter that affects the curve, usually a form of steepness.

parameters.name: seg0beta
parameters.label: Beta
parameters.description: A second paramter that affects the curve, usually a form of bias to the start or end of a curve segment.

parameters.name: seg0slopein
parameters.label: Slope in
parameters.description: Bezier slope factor for the incoming curve segment.

parameters.name: seg0slopeout
parameters.label: Slope Out
parameters.description: Bezier slope factor for the outgoing curve segment.

parameters.name: applylookup
parameters.label: Apply Lookup
parameters.description: The Lookup page lets you apply the curve as a lookup without first converting anything to points.

parameters.name: lookupindexattr
parameters.label: Lookup Index Attribute
parameters.description: Attribute to use as the index for the lookup.

parameters.name: fromlow
parameters.label: From Low High
parameters.description: Reranges the attribute value.

parameters.name: tolow
parameters.label: To Low High
parameters.description: Reranges the input lookup attribute value.

parameters.name: extendleft
parameters.label: Extend Left and Right
parameters.description: What happens when the lookup samples outside of the range.

parameters.name: lookup
parameters.label: Lookup
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks of lookups.

parameters.name: lookup0multiply
parameters.label: Multiply
parameters.description: A multiplier that is applied to the lookup result.

parameters.name: lookup0add
parameters.label: Add
parameters.description: A value you add to the result of a lookup.

parameters.name: lookup0combineop
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: After a value is retrieved doing the lookup, it can be added or multiplied with an attribute.

parameters.name: lookup0outputattrscope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: lookup0overrideautoattr
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: lookup0attrtype
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The lookup attribute type.

parameters.name: lookup0attrnumcomps
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: lookup0defaultval3
parameters.label: Lookup0Defaultval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: seg0endval3
parameters.label: Seg0Endval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: seg0startval3
parameters.label: Seg0Startval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
